EpiEstim: Estimate Time Varying Reproduction Numbers from Epidemic Curves

Source: R/EpiEstim-package.R
EpiEstim-package.Rd

The EpiEstim package provides tools to Tools to quantify transmissibility throughout an epidemic from the analysis of time series of incidence.

Bibliography

A BibTeX file of papers that describe the methodology underlying EpiEstim is available via system.file("epiestimpapers.bib", package = "EpiEstim").

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/mrc-ide/EpiEstim

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/mrc-ide/EpiEstim/issues
